Event: Royal Challenge - Season 31
Event Date: 01/11/2024
Sage Bot Item Code: A14
Tribal Offering

Triggers: Duration of the battle

Damage dealt to the artifact owner is reduced by 20%.
When an ally dies, the artifact owner deals physical damage to all enemies equal to 35% of the max health of the deceased unit.

Requirements: 90-100
